title: Yomocraft Create
description: Modpack made for Yomofans 2024 Yomocraft run spanning December 2024 -> Febuary 2025.
body:
Yomocraft Create is the 2024 run of Yomocraft mainly focusing on the Create Mod and it's addon, Steam 'n' Rails. This SMP run is to be focused on overworld development with a splash of encouragement towards faction-like base development and politics.

The map being ran is Ryglimis by Runnybabbit223 [https://www.planetminecraft.com/project/ryglimis-4k-x-5k-survival-friendly-custom-map-1-16-5/](https://www.planetminecraft.com/project/ryglimis-4k-x-5k-survival-friendly-custom-map-1-16-5/)

Modlist:

3D Skin Layers

Traveler's Backpack

Xaero's Minimap

Xaero's World Map
